note: Marker that flags this as a T4 repo — the hooks fire only when this file is present, so they never touch a non-T4 repo. Set "verify" to the repo's test/verify command (e.g. "bun test") to arm the ship gate: t4-gate then RUNS it before any `gh pr create`/`gh pr merge` and blocks on failure. Empty string = ship gate off. Keep it in sync with .github/workflows/t4-verify.yml.
